product_overview: Life OS is a web-based personal operating system that unifies habits, tasks, finances, academic management, and AI assistance into a single productivity workspace. It provides a dashboard of widgets, dedicated feature pages, and integrated AI and analytics to help users plan and track progress.
core_goals: Provide a single-pane productivity workspace combining habits, tasks, finances, calendar, journal, and university tools.
Enable fast capture and management of tasks and habits with optimistic updates and analytics (streaks, charts).
Offer AI-powered assistance for parsing quick-capture inputs, generating insights, and suggesting actions.
Support account management and secure authentication using Supabase Auth.
Deliver a responsive, accessible design system and consistent UX across desktop and mobile.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign up, sign in, sign out, and request password resets using Supabase Auth so they can access personalized data.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /login -> Click Register link to navigate to registration -> Navigate to /register -> Fill registration form fields -> Click Register button to create account -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /login -> Click Forgot Password link -> Navigate to /reset-password -> Enter email for password reset -> Click submit -> See confirmation message
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with invalid credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to / -> If session expired or not authenticated -> Redirect to /login -> See login page

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Show a 3-zone overview (Now / Today / Context) with dynamic widgets that surface critical tasks, habits, finance summary, and quick-capture entry points.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View dashboard overview widgets in Now/Today/Context zones -> Click a Habits widget item -> Navigate to /habits
Navigate to / -> View dashboard overview widgets -> Click Tasks widget -> Navigate to /tasks
Navigate to / -> If not authenticated -> Redirect to /login -> See login page

features.name: Habit Tracker
features.description: Create, track, and manage daily habits with logging, streak tracking, heatmap and statistics to monitor consistency.
user_flows: Navigate to /habits -> View list of habits -> Click Create new habit button -> Fill habit fields (title, frequency, time_of_day) -> Click Save -> See new habit in list
Navigate to /habits -> View list of habits -> Click checkbox next to a habit to mark it complete -> See habit marked as complete and streak updated
Navigate to /habits -> Click Create new habit button -> Leave title empty -> Click Save -> See validation error for missing title
Navigate to /habits -> Select a habit -> Click Delete -> Confirm deletion -> See habit removed from list

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Create, organize and track tasks with priorities, due dates and Kanban-style status management including quick capture and editing.
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> View task list / Kanban board -> Click Create a new task -> Fill title, description, due date, priority -> Click Save -> See new task appear in Todo column
Navigate to /tasks -> View task list -> Click task checkbox or Mark task as complete action -> See task move to Done
Navigate to /tasks -> Click and drag a task from Todo to In Progress -> Release task -> See task status update to in_progress
Navigate to /tasks -> Click Create a new task -> Leave title empty -> Click Save -> See validation error for missing title

features.name: Calendar
features.description: Provide a monthly/weekly calendar view for scheduling events and surfacing tasks and habit occurrences on specific dates.
user_flows: Navigate to /calendar -> View monthly calendar -> Click a date to view events for that date -> See events listed for selected date
Navigate to /calendar -> Click Next month control -> Calendar navigates to next month -> See updated month view
Navigate to /calendar -> Click Create event -> Fill event fields with invalid date (end before start) -> Click Save -> See validation error and event not created

features.name: Journal
features.description: Write, view and manage daily journal entries with support for creating, editing and deleting entries.
user_flows: Navigate to /journal -> View journal entries list -> Click New entry -> Fill entry content -> Click Save -> See new journal entry in list
Navigate to /journal -> Open existing entry -> Edit content -> Click Save -> See updated entry
Navigate to /journal -> Click New entry -> Leave content empty -> Click Save -> See validation error for required content

features.name: Health Tracking
features.description: Log health metrics such as sleep, water, exercise and mood and view trends and charts over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /health -> View health metrics dashboard -> Click Log health data entry -> Fill metric fields (type, value, date) -> Click Save -> See new entry in metric list and chart update
Navigate to /health -> View chart for sleep trend -> See historical values rendered
Navigate to /health -> Click Log health data entry -> Enter invalid non-numeric value for numeric metric -> Click Save -> See validation error

features.name: Financial Management
features.description: Track income and expenses, view transaction history and charts, and set financial goals with optional AI categorization suggestions.
user_flows: Navigate to /finances -> View financial overview cards and transaction table -> Click Add transaction -> Fill amount, type, date and description -> Accept AI suggested category if presented -> Click Save -> See transaction in table
Navigate to /finances -> View transaction table -> Click transaction row -> Edit transaction details -> Click Save -> See updated transaction reflected in summary
Navigate to /finances -> Click Add transaction -> Fill negative or non-numeric amount -> Click Save -> See validation error and transaction not created
Navigate to /finances -> Click Add transaction -> Fill fields -> Network request fails on save -> See error toast indicating save failure

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create and manage projects with associated tasks and milestones to track progress across multiple projects.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> View project list -> Click Create a new project -> Fill project name and details -> Click Save -> See new project in list
Navigate to /projects -> Open project details -> Click Add task to project -> Fill task fields -> Click Save -> See task added under project
Navigate to /projects -> Click Create a new project -> Leave name empty -> Click Save -> See validation error for missing project name

features.name: AI Assistant
features.description: Open an AI chat assistant to ask questions, parse quick-capture input, receive suggestions, and trigger suggested actions like creating tasks or analyzing data.
user_flows: Navigate to /ai-assistant -> Open AI assistant chat UI -> Type and send a message -> See AI response in conversation history
Navigate to /ai-assistant -> Type quick-capture text -> Click Parse action -> See AI parse preview -> Click Confirm to create suggested task -> See task created in /tasks
Navigate to /ai-assistant -> Type and send message -> AI service returns error or times out -> See error message and option to retry

features.name: Focus Timer
features.description: Start Pomodoro-style focus sessions, pause/resume the timer, complete sessions, and view focus session history.
user_flows: Navigate to /focus -> Click Start a focus session -> Timer starts and counts down -> Click Pause -> Click Resume -> Click Complete when finished -> See session recorded in focus history
Navigate to /focus -> Click Start a focus session while another session is running -> See warning that a session is already active

features.name: Gamification
features.description: Display achievements, XP, levels and leaderboards to motivate users with progress and rewards.
user_flows: Navigate to /gamification -> View achievements list and XP progress -> Click an achievement to view details -> See achievement detail modal
Navigate to /gamification -> Open leaderboard -> See ranked users and points -> If leaderboard fails to load -> See error state and retry option

features.name: Settings
features.description: Manage user preferences, theme, language, and profile information from a single settings page.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> View settings page -> Change theme settings -> Click Save -> See theme update applied
Navigate to /settings -> Change language preferences -> Click Save -> See UI language update
Navigate to /settings -> Update profile information -> Click Save -> Server returns validation error -> See error message and fields highlighted

features.name: University
features.description: Manage courses, assignments, grades and use simulators (What-If) to predict academic outcomes.
user_flows: Navigate to /university -> View courses list -> Click Create course -> Fill course fields -> Click Save -> See course appear in list
Navigate to /university -> Open a course -> Click Add assignment -> Fill assignment details including due date and weight -> Click Save -> See assignment listed and average recalculated
Navigate to /university -> Click What-If simulator -> Enter hypothetical grades -> Click Run -> See predicted final grade
Navigate to /university -> Click Create course -> Leave required fields empty -> Click Save -> See validation error
